rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §34.002, which governs school bus safety standards and transportation allotment eligibility.
quote: Sec. 34.002. SAFETY STANDARDS. (a) The Department of Public Safety, with the advice of the Texas Education Agency, shall establish safety standards for school buses used to transport students in accordance with Section 34.003.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns school bus safety standards and has no operative connection to homestead exemption amounts.
